subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One calleth between the worlds and enjoineth upon the people that which hath been ordained by the Mighty, the All-Wise. Say: I have been created [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان المظلوم ینادی بین العالم و یامر الناس بما امر به من لدی العزیز الحکیم قل قد خلقت
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
